 喜好：争霸   都市创业   系统  传统修仙  末世  同人  三国  洪荒  西方奇幻  诡异  盗墓  男变女  如果有相同喜好可以在我书架找你想看的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyOoC2eOwTKnZ1zd/O7FWezL61619vapnFQ37lzMOaMX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c284de947d5481b827cf5ffbdb80f07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705134&x-signature=EJfnUpAfmQaOtZCLcRO%2B5G%2B1TGA%3D","user_id":"1956759990174892","user_name":"奥特曼打小怪兽TM"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1956759990174892","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774633715,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7301194449885858851","book_info":{"abstract":"一缕真灵意外进入洪荒世界，与昆仑山上一根上品先天灵根清净银杏树合二为一，为了凝聚元神，消耗大量本源，跌落成下品先天灵根。如此跟脚，在一干洪荒顶级大能面前，难免有沦为座下童子的风险。
为了免于在洪荒接连不断的大劫中化为飞灰，他只好发奋图强，一边日夜苦修，参天悟道，恢复原有品阶，一边发挥本体净化天赋，不断自残，折断枝干扦插大地，化身无数，净化天地煞气、浊气、晦气等，成为洪荒有德道人。
直到某一天，他发现九天十地，到处都是自己的分身。
